criteria.description: Humidifier tile renders ON/OFF + duration + cycles_24h from /api/humidifier/state; duty-cycle strip renders transitions from /api/humidifier/history; range switch refetches history.
criteria.evidence: 2-commit branch shape (feat + docs) under the new runbook protocol — first feature to land cleanly after the /simplify-in-feat structural change. WRAPUP_SENTINEL output: `WRAPUP_SENTINEL: 2 commits, 0 unstaged`. `pnpm test:e2e` on main after cherry-pick: 21/21 green (+5 humidifier tests). Python invariants + per-app: 143/143.

notes: First validation of the new runbook (/simplify folded into feat commit + WRAPUP_SENTINEL forcing function, commit 3a06109). Agent followed F1-F5 + W1-W7 cleanly; the `(with simplify pass)` suffix present in the feat commit message as designed. Structural fix appears to have resolved the premature-exit class of bug. Next FE feature (plants cluster) will be the first multi-feature cluster test under the new runbook.
